title: Compilers 1

prerequisites.text: Admission to BSc Hons specialising in Computer Science or Information Technology.

outline: This course will introduce students to the inner mechanics of a modern programming language compiler or interpreter. Students will appreciate why programming languages are designed in particular ways and they will learn how to develop compilers and compiler-related tools. Course content includes: language classes, formal grammars, recursive descent parsing, tokenisers, parsing, and abstract syntax trees.
